characters.physical_details: Black woman; old right-knee surgery scar.
characters.occupation_status: County detective (suspended ch05, reinstated restricted ch08, terminated ch16); independent investigator by ch18.

state_transitions.change: Suspended.
Reinstated with monitoring restrictions.
Terminated after rejecting Deshawn Lee arrest narrative on camera.
Provides sworn federal intake materials.
Starts Delta Accountability Project with Mara.

characters.physical_details: White man; right wrist fractured at icehouse seizure.
characters.literacy_languages: English; police reports and chain forms.

state_transitions.change: Comminuted distal-radius fracture during federal transfer clash.
Imposes two-key safety rule for live moves.
Resigns; begins PT in Greenville.

characters.occupation_status: Reporter through ch17; independent records investigator by ch18.

state_transitions.change: Captures Hollis near service corridor pre-blackout.
Livestreams launch confrontation; mirrors files to external desks.
Co-founds Delta Accountability Project.

characters.occupation_status: Sheriff throughout; remains in office under censure after plea addendum.

state_transitions.change: Imposes Admin Directive 14-B controls.
Pushes Deshawn arrest narrative; terminates Lena.
Plea reduced to ethics misdemeanors; no extra jail time.

characters.physical_details: Black woman; hand arthritis; church ledger keeper.

state_transitions.change: Provides Unit 14 key lead.
Cuts contact after unredacted docket release.
Limited practical contact resumes (no full reconciliation).

characters.physical_details: Black woman; formaldehyde burn scarring on hands.

state_transitions.change: Confesses Voss/Fenn killings, denies Ava/Thomas, gives copied transfer-tag notes.
Directs Isaiah reburial; sets legal/privacy boundary around Malik.

characters.physical_details: White woman; judge/foundation leader with migraines.
characters.occupation_status: Judge/foundation leader at start; probation and permanent judicial disqualification by ch18.

state_transitions.change: Gives safe combination; names Hollis as mover.
Steps down from Gideon board; receives four-year probation and judicial disqualification.

characters.occupation_status: Deputy through ch17; cooperating defendant by ch18.

state_transitions.change: Linked to HR-coded trust disbursements and transfer authority.
Attempts warrantless seizure at Bell Creek livestream.
Receives 42-month sentence with no-contact term.

characters.physical_details: Black 1963 lynching victim; remains repeatedly moved/staged.

state_transitions.change: Staged at Voss scene.
Staged at Fenn scene.
Staged at Thomas Pike scene.
Reburied under corrected full legal name.

characters.physical_details: Black teenage student and basketball player.

state_transitions.change: Doxxed via leaked school schedule; relocated for safety.
Temporary custody/transport schedule moved to Marcus and Ida.

timeline.story_start: Late August 2026 at Voss Cotton Gin.
timeline.estimated_span: About 9-10 weeks, August to late October/early November 2026.

key_events.event: Voss killed; Isaiah staged at gin
Fenn killed; masked morgue override documented
Ava Boyd killed; tagged-teeth signature appears
Icehouse records found then federally seized
Gala blackout; Thomas Pike killed; Isaiah staged again; Deshawn detained
Ruth confession livestream; federal dual-track opens; Deshawn released
Plea outcomes, trust freeze, Isaiah reburial

key_locations.name: Voss Cotton Gin
key_locations.details: First homicide and first Isaiah staging site.

key_locations.name: Delta Lock and Store Unit 14
key_locations.details: Deputy Waller INDEX notebook recovery site.

key_locations.name: Old Icehouse
key_locations.details: Historic night-hearing records cache; seized federally.

key_locations.name: Pike Foundation Hall Service Corridor
key_locations.details: Blackout murder lane with known camera dead zones.

key_locations.name: Bell Creek Launch
key_locations.details: Ruth confession and Hollis confrontation site.

distances: Pike Foundation Hall is about 2 miles from the old icehouse.
Levee-side back route reaches the icehouse after the second cattle guard.
Morgue south dock, crematory lanes, and launch road support late-night cooler movement.

world_rules: Admissibility depends on chain precision and warrant scope.
Directive 14-B controls can restrict records, messaging, and access.
Mirrored off-county releases are required to prevent suppression.

power_structure.over: Sheriff staffing, detention narrative, local release posture
power_structure.mechanism: Elected command authority and Directive 14-B controls
Trust governance, shell vendors, coded payouts
Federal intake, cooperation terms, chancery injunctions

objects.name: Isaiah Bell remains
objects.owner: County evidence chain until chapter_18 transfer
objects.origin: 1963 victim repeatedly moved through compromised channels

objects.name: Mercer docket red ledger and safe packet
objects.owner: Mirrored to Bell counsel, civil firms, and media
objects.status: Released unredacted; documents trust seizure chain

objects.name: Tagged-teeth jar
objects.status: Marks signature shift from full-body staging

objects.name: Deshawn med/property transfer slip
objects.owner: Keisha Lee copy plus defense filings
objects.status: Shows 7:18 handoff and 20:56 first inhaler dose after distress

debts.status: Stable before chapter_16, unstable after termination

debts.amount: $187 remaining after mortgage, inhaler refill, and note (chapter_18)

knowledge_state.knows: She killed Voss and Fenn, staged Isaiah there, and denies killing Ava Boyd or Thomas Pike.
Hollis moved records/remains-linked boxes and Pike safe held docket/trust files.
Deshawn arrest packet was inconsistent and inhaler access was delayed despite logged handoff.
Trust disbursement code HR mapped to Hollis Reddick and aligned with transfer-night routes.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Command/public until filings and federal intake

knowledge_state.knows: Deputy Eli Waller signatures legitimated post-1963 dispossession paperwork.

environmental_constants: Heat and humidity dominate scenes; colder levee wind arrives by reburial.
Interiors smell of bleach, paper, and coffee.
Storms, outages, and comms failures disrupt scene control.
